title: <div>Rising Tension  Andrew pushes himself beyond limits, suffering physically a
content:
Rising Tension Andrew pushes himself beyond limits, suffering physically and mentally.
Midpoint (False Victory) He earns Fletcher’s approval—for a moment.
All is Lost Andrew is expelled, his dreams shattered.
Climax He returns and plays flawlessly—not for Fletcher, but for himself.
Resolution A moment of mutual respect—but was it worth it?

🔥 Key Takeaways for Your Story:
• Ruthless personal ambition drives the protagonist.
• The antagonist isn’t evil—they challenge the protagonist to extremes.
• The climax is about proving something to oneself.

Real – The Hero’s Journey

Beat Description
Ordinary World Nomiya, a former basketball player, feels lost.
Call to Adventure He meets Togawa, who plays wheelchair basketball.
Refusal of the Call Nomiya feels he has no place in this world anymore.
Meeting the Mentor Togawa challenges him: “Why are you running from this?”
Crossing the Threshold He joins the team but struggles.
context: From document: The Graphic Novel Writing Guide for Derek: Inspiration, Structure… — chunk 20 (chunk 20/22)
